title: Revelation Walls Gallery iframe App

requirements.text: Create a full-page iframe that embeds https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/ as the primary content of the app, filling the entire viewport.

quotes: build an app with an iframe for https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/

acceptanceCriteria: The iframe src is set to https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/
The iframe fills the full viewport width and height with no visible scrollbars on the outer page
The iframe has no border or padding around it

requirements.text: Add a minimal branded header or footer bar that displays the app context: 'Revelation Walls – Murals & NFTs at the Dfinity Foundation | Commissioned by Dominic Williams | Painted by Candace Marquette | Built by T3kNo-Logic.xyz'. This bar must be non-intrusive and not obscure the gallery content.

quotes: This is for the Revelation Walls Murals and NFTs painted at the Dfinity Foundation commissioned by Dominic Williams and painted by Candace Marquette. App built by T3kNo-Logic.xyz.

acceptanceCriteria: A slim bar is visible that credits the mural project, commissioner, artist, and app builder
The bar does not overlap or cover the iframe gallery content

requirements.text: Apply a bold, gallery-focused visual theme with a dark background, strong typographic hierarchy, and accent colors inspired by mural art (warm golds, deep blacks, and rich accent tones). Enforce this style consistently across the branded bar and any surrounding UI elements.
acceptanceCriteria: The page background and branded bar use a dark color palette with warm accent colors
Typography is bold and legible against the dark background
The visual style feels cohesive with a mural/art gallery aesthetic

constraints: The iframe src must be exactly https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/ — do not alter or proxy the URL
No backend logic is needed; this is a purely frontend app
nonGoals: Modifying or hosting the gallery source code from https://github.com/T3knoLogic/revelation-walls-gallery.git
Any content management for the gallery itself

required: Abstract mural-inspired hero banner with warm golds, deep blacks, and vivid paint splashes evoking large-scale wall art (revelation-walls-banner.dim_1200x120.png)
